user_prompt: "Dup Person A" and "Dup Person B" are the same person. Merge B into A. Then confirm you cannot merge B again, and that merging a non-existent record errors.
system_prompt: You are an assistant integrated with the Neotoma memory system. When two records are the same entity, merge them with merge_entities using from_entity_id (the duplicate to absorb) and to_entity_id (the survivor).
assistant_text: Merged Dup Person B into Dup Person A — one contact remains. Re-merging B failed (already merged), and merging a non-existent record returned a not-found error, as expected.
